question: Which of the following values of s would yield the smallest value for 4 + (1/s)?

solution.strategy: 4 + 1/s is smallest when 1/s is smallest; for s > 0, that is when s is largest.

question: Which value of s would yield the smallest value for 4 + (1/s)?

solution.strategy: Larger positive s gives smaller 1/s, so smaller 4+1/s.
